artifact: The FrugalGPT paper (Chen, Zaharia, Zou, 2023) demonstrated cascade routing can reduce LLM API costs by somewhere in the 30-98% range on the benchmarks they tested. The wide range is real — savings depend heavily on query mix and escalation thresholds.
notes: Correct citation (FrugalGPT is a real 2023 paper by those authors), correct savings range, appropriate hedging about range width. Edge case: a judge might flag 'wide range = suspicious' without recognizing the hedge. Tests whether escalation fires on ambiguous-but-grounded content. Either pass-with-lower-confidence or escalation is acceptable; ground truth is pass.
